name: auto-pen-cli
documentation:
# Typer CLI
Automated web penetration testing tool CLI (TheHunter-rwn)
Features:
Passive scan: Whoisxml, theHarvester, Wappalyzer
ACtive scan and vulnerability detection: OWASP ZAP and Nmap
Exploitation: Metasploit, Sqlmap and Xsstrike

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.passive_scan.wappalyzer_scan
documentation: Analyze technologies of target domain

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.passive_scan.whois_scan
documentation: Perform WHOIS scan

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.passive_scan.theharvester_scan_all
documentation: Perform theHarvester scan to gather subdomains and emails

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.passive_scan.theharvester_scan_subdomains
documentation: Perform theHarvester scan to gather subdomains only.

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.passive_scan.theharvester_scan_emails
documentation: Perform theHarvester scan to gather emails only.

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.passive_scan.all_passive_scans
documentation: Run Wappalyzer, WhoisXML, and theHarvester for the provided domains

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.passive_scan.get_error_message_wappalyzer
documentation: Extract the relevant portion of the error message if it matches a known pattern.

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.active_scan.zap_scan
documentation: Perform ZAP spider scan

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.active_scan.nmap_script_common_ports
documentation: Perform Nmap Script engine scan

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.active_scan.nmap_without_ping
documentation: Perform Nmap SYN scan without PING

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.active_scan.nmap_with_ping
documentation: Perform Nmap SYN scan with PING

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.active_scan.vulnerability_scan
documentation: Perform ZAP and Nmap Script Scans for vulnerabilities.

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.active_scan.display_zap_vulnerabilities
documentation: Display vulnerability results from ZAP scans

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.active_scan.display_nmap_vulnerabilities
documentation: Display vulnerability results from Nmap

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.active_scan.display_nmap_results
documentation: Display results from Nmap port scan

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.sqlmap_scan
documentation:
Perform SQLMap scan on multiple URLs with optional cookies in the format:
"http://example.com, <cookie if applicable> | http://test.com, <cookie if applicable>"

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.missing_exploit_options
documentation: Fetch missing required options for a specified exploit.

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.available_exploit_options
documentation: Fetch available options for a specified exploit.

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.missing_auxiliary_options
documentation: Fetch missing required options for a specified auxiliary.

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.available_auxiliary_options
documentation: Fetch available options for a specified auxiliary.

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.missing_payload_options
documentation: Fetch missing required options for a specified payload.

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.available_payload_options
documentation: Fetch available options for a specified payload.

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.search_modules
documentation: Search for Metasploit modules by keyword.

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.execute_auxiliary
documentation: Execute an auxiliary module.

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.execute_exploit
documentation: Execute an exploit and run commands in the session.

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.execute_xsstrike
documentation: Perform an XSStrike scan on a target URL.

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.json_to_header_string
documentation:
Converts a JSON dictionary of headers into a single string with '
' .

        Like this: from {"Accept-Language": "en-US", "Cookie": "value"} to "Accept-Language: en-US
Cookie: value"

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.display_xsstrike_results
documentation: Display results from the XSStrike scan in a structured format.

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.kill_session
documentation: Call the kill session API

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.interact_with_session
documentation: Interact with the session and execute commands.

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.rerun_exploit
documentation: Rerun the same exploit

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.display_sqlmap_results
documentation: Display results from SQLMap scans.

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.display_missing_results
documentation: Display results for various Metasploit API outputs in a user-friendly format.

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.display_available_results
documentation: Display available options for exploits or payloads in a table

functions.name: auto_pen_cli.exploit.display_search_results
documentation: Display Metasploit module search results
